content.en:
"The Chaos Avenue has completely entered the realm of the Law Phase, and my strength has improved a lot again, coupled with the Tiangang Battle Method, this time I have entered this world so far, my strength has increased several times!"

Ye Tian was very happy.

Moreover, after refining a trace of the cosmic origin this time and gaining insight into the essence of the cosmic origin, if you want to cultivate any supernatural power in the future, you don't need to go to great lengths to find the corresponding Heavenly Dao text.

For example, Ye Tian's Hell Divine Sky Spear is a great divine power, and it is relatively easy for him to cultivate this great divine power to the consummation realm.

In addition, although the Great Divine Power of the Five Elements Divine Wheel is in the Xiaocheng realm, the power is still not enough, and only when it reaches the Dacheng realm or even the consummation realm can it burst out with more terrifying power.

And the time great supernatural power, Ye Tian couldn't cultivate it before, because he didn't have the time heaven dao text, and he couldn't comprehend and cultivate the time great supernatural power.

But now, he doesn't need the Heavenly Dao of Time text anymore, and he can comprehend the Great Divine Power of Time.

"Fortunately, before I left the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, I exchanged all those points that were about to be invalidated for resources and supernatural power inheritance, and exchanged many great supernatural powers one by one. Otherwise, after leaving the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, it will be too difficult to obtain a great divine power inheritance, and the price you need to pay is hundreds of times that of the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, or even more!"

Ye Tian said happily.

And he has more than one of the great supernatural powers such as time and space.

Therefore, he now does not lack the inheritance of great supernatural powers, and he can cultivate any great supernatural power at any time.

"If you don't cultivate the Great Divine Power first, you can go back and cultivate again! There are still some opportunities in this world, you can look for them again, you can't waste this opportunity!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

He was going to stay in this world for a few more days before choosing to leave.

If you leave now, it's too early!

Ye Tian left this temporary cave mansion and found a direction to fly at random.

In the following days, Ye Tian did find some good things in this world, although it was far inferior to Tiangang's battle method, but it was also a good treasure or opportunity.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a lake.

"This lake is good, it is a rare thousand weak waters!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

The Thousand Weak Water is very precious, although he has also been to the Thousand Weak Water Land to cultivate before, but that Thousand Heavy Weak Water Land was built, and he paid a huge price.

And now this thousand-heavy weak water lake is obviously natural, because Yuntan Heavenly Monarch left not long after building this world, with that person's cultivation realm, it is impossible to care about any thousand weak water, and naturally he will not build a thousand weak water lakes.

"This lake is good, but it's a bit of a hassle to take it away!"

Ye Tian frowned.

It is almost unrealistic to put a thousand weak water lakes into the space storage at once, after all, this is a thousand weak water, not ordinary weak water, and naturally it cannot be collected all at once.

If a powerful master arrived, he could use his powerful cultivation to forcibly take away the thousand weak waters of this lake, but now Ye Tian still couldn't do it.

"I can only collect the thousand heavy weak water into the Void Mina Realm or the Chaos Ancient Realm little by little, although it will waste a lot of time, but compared to the value of a lake's thousand weak water, the time wasted is completely worth it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he was ready to enter the Thousand Heavy Weak Water Lake and slowly collect the Thousand Heavy Weak Water.

But when Ye Tian was just about to enter, a loud laugh came from the lake.

"Hahahaha, Wanfa Zhenjun, I didn't expect to run into you again!"

As soon as the words fell, a figure forcibly rushed out of the thousand-fold weak water lake.

"Allah the Immortal, it's you!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

He had not specifically probed the lake and therefore did not detect the existence of Allah.

I didn't expect such a coincidence, this world is so big, and I met the Immortal Allah here!

"Immortal Allah, you don't want to run away, you dare to appear in front of me, last time you used a special secret treasure to escape, what else do you want to use to escape this time?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"This time, I'm not going to run away, I'm going to kill you!"

Allah the Immortal said coldly.

"Do you have the strength?" Ye Tian disdained.

Immortal Allah hahaha: "You don't know yet, I entered the inheritance land of this world this time, obtained the inheritance, and also obtained a treasure that can greatly increase the strength of the physical body." Before, I had been using the Thousand Layers of Weak Water to assist in refining that treasure, but now, my physical body is several times stronger, and although your strength is powerful, it is not much stronger than mine. Now, my strength has skyrocketed, and you're dead!"

"Inheritance, treasure, so it is!"

Ye Tian understood where the confidence of the immortal Allah came from.

It turned out that the immortal Allah also entered the inheritance land of the Yuntan Heavenly Monarch, with the strength of the immortal Allah, although he could not pass the second layer of difficult assessment, but it was extremely easy to pass the first level of assessment, if he performed well in the second level of assessment, even if he did not succeed in the assessment, he would add a lot of points.

Therefore, Allah the Immortal should have obtained the first form of the Tiangang Battle Method and a good treasure.

With the talent of Allah Immortal, coupled with such a short period of time, he would definitely not be able to train the first layer of the Tiangang Battle Method, and could only temporarily increase his strength with the help of that treasure.

Unfortunately, Allah the Immortal did not know that the gap between him and Ye Tian had not narrowed, but had become even larger.

"Immortal Allah, are you talking about the inheritance of the Tiangang Warfare Method?"

Ye Tian smiled and said.

"What, you're in too?"

Allah the Immortal was surprised and at the same time a little nervous.

He was not afraid that Ye Tian would obtain a more complete Tiangang battle method, because the Tiangang battle method was very mysterious, and it was difficult to practice in a short time.

What he was afraid of was that Ye Tian had also obtained a treasure similar to that that could skyrocket his strength in a short period of time, so he would have no chance of winning.

"I have obtained the complete Tiangang Battle Technique and another treasure, but unfortunately I have not been given a treasure to increase the strength of my physical body!" Ye Tian said.

"Hahaha, then you're dead!"

Allah is shocked.

In this way, he can completely kill Ye Tian.

Although you can't get the full version of Tiangang's Battle Method, you can get another treasure!

But at this time, Ye Tian suddenly said again: "However, I have practiced the first form of Tiangang Combat Method, presumably you haven't practiced it yet, I don't know if you want to see the first form of Tiangang Combat Method?"

"Impossible, you can't practice the first form of Tiangang Battle Method in such a short period of time. yes, you must be bluffing to scare me away. I'm not going to be fooled, I'm going to kill you this time!"

Speaking, Allah the Immortal attacked and vowed to kill Ye Tian.

"Hey, why bother!"

Ye Tian sighed slightly.

Immediately, the Chaos Haifa Phase appeared on his body, and the completely physical version of the Chaos Haifa Phase made the pupils of the Immortal Allah shrink.

Last time, Ye Tian was just condensing the rudimentary form, but now he has stepped into that stage and truly formed the Chaos Sea Law Phase, and the combat effectiveness between the two is different.

Then.

Ye Tian performed the first form of Tiangang Combat Method, and Tiangang Qi appeared on his body.

When the heavenly gang qi wrapped Ye Tian's whole body, the pupils of the Immortal Allah shrank sharply, and his heart was extremely frightened.

"He really practiced the first form of Tiangang Combat Method!"

Allah the Immortal fears.
